rooms.title: Deluxe Double & Twin Room
rooms.subtitle: Deluxe Double & Twin Room
rooms.description: Experience unparalleled ocean views and private beach access in this stunning Mediterranean-inspired villa. Featuring floor-to-ceiling windows, infinity pool, and direct beach access.
rooms.longDescription: Step into a world where the horizon is yours alone. Our Luxury Beachfront Villa places you at the edge of nature's grandest canvas — the sea. Wake to the sound of waves lapping at white sand, dine under open skies, and unwind in a private infinity pool that seems to pour directly into the ocean. Every detail has been curated for the traveler who demands nothing less than extraordinary.

rooms.title: Deluxe Suite
rooms.subtitle: Deluxe Suite
rooms.description: Contemporary luxury at its finest with panoramic city views, smart home technology, and an expansive rooftop terrace perfect for entertainment and relaxation.
rooms.longDescription: The Penthouse redefines altitude. Occupying the entire top floor, this architectural statement piece fuses smart technology with raw material beauty — polished concrete, hand-blown glass, and walls of windows that frame the city like a living painting. The rooftop terrace is your private stage above it all.

rooms.title: Deluxe Family Room
rooms.subtitle: Deluxe Family Room
rooms.description: Immerse yourself in lush tropical gardens and pristine beaches. This eco-luxury villa features open-air living spaces, private waterfalls, and sustainable design elements.
rooms.longDescription: In harmony with the earth, our Tropical Paradise villa is a living, breathing ecosystem. Canopied by ancient trees, threaded by stone paths to hidden gardens and your own cascading waterfall, this sanctuary is designed around the radical idea that luxury and sustainability are not opposites — they are one.

rooms.title: Geodesic Igloo Room
rooms.subtitle: Geodesic Igloo Room
rooms.description: Step back in time with this meticulously restored colonial estate. Featuring original architectural details, antique furnishings, and modern amenities for the discerning traveler.
rooms.longDescription: The Heritage Estate is a love letter to another era. Every column, cornice, and courtyard speaks of careful restoration — of hands that understood that beauty ages if you let it. Antique four-poster beds, hand-laid mosaic floors, and verandahs draped in bougainvillea await alongside every modern comfort you expect.

rooms.title: Bunk Bed Room
rooms.subtitle: Bunk Bed Room
rooms.description: Experience luxury in the heart of the desert with this architectural masterpiece. Enjoy starlit skies, infinity pools, and minimalist design that celebrates the natural landscape.
rooms.longDescription: The Desert Oasis is built for those who find beauty in reduction. Pale stone walls absorb the sun's heat through the day and release it slowly through cool desert nights. The infinity pool reflects a sky uninterrupted by light pollution. Nothing distracts. Everything feels essential. This is luxury as pure presence.
